---
name: Takedown or correction request
about: Request removal or correction of a record (sealed/expunged, not public, or factual error)
title: "[Takedown] "
labels: takedown, priority-high
---

**Type of request**
- [ ] Record is sealed or expunged
- [ ] Data is not actually public / was posted in error
- [ ] Factual error / correction

**What record(s)?** (source, date, city, case number if known - do NOT include mugshots)

**Reason / supporting detail**

**Contact (optional)**
